sections.paragraph:
fut. יִלְחַץ i.q. נָחַץ (kindred to אָלַץ, אָנַס, אוּץ), [נָחַץ], to press, to squeeze, Num 22:25 2Ki 6:32 to oppress, to afflict a people, Exo 23:9 Jdg 1:34 2:18 . (Arab. لحص VIII. to compel, لحز to set upon, to be importunate with, Samaritan Dan 6:1-28 Act 9:1-43.)

Niphal, to squeeze oneself, Num 22:25. Hence-
